scenarios.reasoning: RHEL 7 reached end-of-life on June 30, 2024. No further security patches are available. Upgrade to RHEL 8/9 or Amazon Linux 2/2023 is required to restore security compliance for this AWS-deployed containerized application.
triggered_by: Operating System no longer receiving security patches

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.reasoning: RHEL 7 is already a standard Linux distribution. The application runs on standard Linux, satisfying this scenario. An OS upgrade is needed for EOL reasons but the standard Linux objective is met.

AnalyticsApp-003 runs on Linux (RHEL 7), is containerized, uses Python 3.9 (ARM-compatible), and is open source. These characteristics make it eligible for ARM-based CPU migration (e.g., AWS Graviton) for compute cost savings.
triggered_by: Open source application - no vendor ARM certification required

scenarios.reasoning: Apache Tomcat 6.1 reached end-of-life in December 2016 - over 9 years ago. This is a critical security vulnerability. Upgrade to Tomcat 10.x or 11.x is required. The open source nature allows direct upgrade management.
triggered_by: Application server no longer receiving security patches

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.reasoning: AnalyticsApp-003 is already deployed on AWS. Cloud deployment objective is fully satisfied.
AnalyticsApp-003 is already containerized. This scenario objective is fully satisfied.

AnalyticsApp-003 already has a 3-Tier architecture and is open source (not custom-made). The existing architecture is appropriately decoupled and the application is not custom-developed, so refactoring/decoupling is not applicable.

PostgreSQL 13 reached end-of-life in November 2025. No further bug fixes or security patches are available. Upgrade to PostgreSQL 16 or 17 is required. The 200GB database and open source nature make this upgrade manageable.
triggered_by: Database no longer receiving security patches

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch DB Engine to open-source database solution
scenarios.reasoning: PostgreSQL is already an open-source database engine. This scenario objective is fully satisfied.

Python 3.9 is EOL (October 2025) and Tomcat 6.1 is EOL (December 2016). Both primary runtime components require urgent updates. Being open source, the team has full control over updating these components. RHEL 7 upgrade also needed.
triggered_by: Open source application - team controls component versions
